channel.title: WordPress Website Development using React & Frontity
channel.description:
In case any member of the community is interested:
The startup SupportLogic, whose website is built with Frontity (https://www.supportlogic.io/) is looking for an experienced React Developer to enhance the functionality of their existing theme, update the design and add several new features.
You can find more details about the project and job here:
https://www.upwork.com/job/Wordpress-Website-Development-using-ReactJS-Frontity_~01fc4cdab5c9620c9e/

item.title: WordPress Website Development using React & Frontity
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
In case any member of the community is interested:

The startup SupportLogic, whose website is built with Frontity (https://www.supportlogic.io/) is looking for an experienced React Developer to enhance the functionality of their existing theme, update the design and add several new features.

You can find more details about the project and job here:

Upwork

Wordpress Website Development using ReactJS & Frontity

We are a startup in Silicon Valley, our company website (https://www.supportlogic.io) is built on ReactJS and Frontity with wordpress as the CMS platform (headless CMS). We are using wpengine for Wordpress and the front-end is served through a GCP VM...

Read full topic
item.source: WordPress Website Development using React & Frontity
